get.description:
Layer 1 — comparison table. Comparison columns only (reuses the frozen
_employee_comparison rollup); no overview/analytics fields here.

Layer 2/3 — shared overview aggregation for the drawer and the route's
Overview tab.

Layer 3 Benchmarks tab — full weekly ledger + overdue for one employee,
so the client reconciles backlog (same logic as the employee's own widget).

get.description: Projects the current user leads + the members they may assign to.

parameters.name: planning_plant_code

schema.description: Return only Maintenance Plants belonging to this Planning Plant code (e.g. '2400'). Used by the project-scoped dropdown on the work-report form.
schema.title: Planning Plant Code

parameters.description: Return only Maintenance Plants belonging to this Planning Plant code (e.g. '2400'). Used by the project-scoped dropdown on the work-report form.

schema.title: Response List Maintenance Plants Api V1 Plants Maintenance Plants Get

AccountCreate.title: AccountCreate
AccountCreate.description: Create a new login account and link it to the employee.

AccountLink.title: AccountLink
AccountLink.description: Relink the employee to a different existing user account.

AccountRoleUpdate.title: AccountRoleUpdate
AccountRoleUpdate.description: Change the role of the employee's linked account.

ActivityCreate.title: ActivityCreate
ActivityCreate.description: Top-level Activity. parent_id is implicit (None) — never accepted here.

ActivityMasterUpdate.title: ActivityMasterUpdate
ActivityMasterUpdate.description:
Shared update shape for both levels. Service rejects benchmark_* edits
on a level='activity' row (benchmarks only apply to sub-activities).

AssignableMember.title: AssignableMember
AssignableMember.description: A project member a team lead may assign a task to.

AssignableProject.title: AssignableProject
AssignableProject.description: A project the current user leads, with its assignable members.

ChangePasswordRequest.title: ChangePasswordRequest
ChangePasswordRequest.description: Self-service password change. Confirm-new is validated client-side.

DailyBenchmarkRowOut.title: DailyBenchmarkRowOut
DailyBenchmarkRowOut.description:
One row of 'My Alerts' / 'Team Benchmark Backlog' — a single day's
actual/target/pending for one NUMERIC sub-activity, with pending > 0
(a clean day doesn't show up in this list, though it still counts
toward the weekly productivity %). `sub_activity_name` is the "Activity
Name" shown in the UI examples (e.g. "FMTL Rework").

EmployeeBenchmarksOut.title: EmployeeBenchmarksOut
EmployeeBenchmarksOut.description:
One employee's FULL weekly daily ledger (every NUMERIC sub-activity day,
not just the pending ones) + overdue, so the client can run the same
backlog reconciliation the employee's own widget does — later-day surplus
paying down earlier deficits. Raw per-day pending lives in `daily`;
reconciliation is applied client-side (display only).

EmployeeComplianceOut.title: EmployeeComplianceOut
EmployeeComplianceOut.description:
The acting employee's own report-compliance snapshot for today plus
any unfiled previous working days (within the editable submission window).

EmployeeOverviewOut.title: EmployeeOverviewOut
EmployeeOverviewOut.description:
Shared payload for Layer 2 (drawer) + Layer 3 (Overview tab). Single
source so the two surfaces can never diverge.

EmployeePerformanceRowOut.title: EmployeePerformanceRowOut
EmployeePerformanceRowOut.description:
One row of the PM comparison table (Layer 1). Comparison columns ONLY —
inspection/overview fields deliberately live on EmployeeOverviewOut so the
table can't grow into an analytics surface. `productivity` is None when the
employee logged no NUMERIC benchmark work this week; `status` is derived
from it via the frozen thresholds in service._status_from_pct.

EmployeeProfile.title: EmployeeProfile
EmployeeProfile.description:
Business-identity view embedded in /auth/me.

Manager and office are resolved to display names server-side so that an
employee (who may not read other employee/office rows) still sees them.

LinkedEmployee.title: LinkedEmployee
LinkedEmployee.description: Compact employee summary attached to a user row in the admin list.

MaintenancePlantOut.title: MaintenancePlantOut
MaintenancePlantOut.description:
Flattened with the parent Planning Plant's code/description — the
shape both the Project form and the Work Report row need (pick the
Maintenance Plant, auto-show the Planning Plant info).

OverdueActivityOut.title: OverdueActivityOut
OverdueActivityOut.description:
One row of 'My Alerts' / 'Team Overdue Activities' — a TASK_BASED
work-report-task row past its due_date and not completed.

SubActivityCreate.title: SubActivityCreate
SubActivityCreate.description: Sub-Activity created under a path-param Activity id.

SubActivityFlatOut.title: SubActivityFlatOut
SubActivityFlatOut.description:
Leaf rows flattened with the parent Activity's name — for the work-report
cascading-select / combobox use case.

TaskCompletionUpdate.title: TaskCompletionUpdate
TaskCompletionUpdate.description:
Body for PATCH /work-reports/tasks/{task_id}/completion — the *only*
way a TASK_BASED row's completion is changed once the parent report is
submitted/locked, since these activities often complete days after the
report they were logged on. Independent of report.status by design.

TaskStatusOut.title: TaskStatusOut
TaskStatusOut.description:
One row of 'My Alerts' / 'Overdue Tasks' panel — a TASK_BASED
work-report-task row, broader than OverdueActivityOut: also covers
due-today and rows completed this week, with `status` driving the
Pending/Due Today/Completed badge in the UI.

TeamComparisonRowOut.title: TeamComparisonRowOut
TeamComparisonRowOut.description:
One row of the PM 'compare employee performance' table — an employee's
weekly benchmark rollup (summed target/actual/pending + productivity %).
productivity_pct is None when the employee logged no NUMERIC benchmark
work this week (no target to measure against).

UserListItem.title: UserListItem
UserListItem.description: A user row enriched with its linked employee (one-to-one), if any.
